scripts.title: Whispering Waves Lullaby
scripts.hook: Hush now, little one, listen to the ocean's gentle song
scripts.lyrics: The waves whisper secrets, soft and low. The moon shines bright, don't you know. It's time for sleep, it's time to rest. Let the waves rock you, be your nest.

scenes.text: The waves whisper secrets, soft and low.
The moon shines bright, don't you know.
It's time for sleep, it's time to rest.
Let the waves rock you, be your nest.

scripts.cta: Close your eyes and dream of the ocean's peaceful shore.

scripts.title: Raindrop Lullaby
scripts.hook: Gently falling raindrops, lull you to a peaceful slumber
scripts.lyrics: Raindrops gently falling, soft and slow. The world outside is quiet now. It's time for sleep, don't you know.

scenes.text: Raindrops gently falling, soft and slow.
The world outside is quiet now.
It's time for sleep, don't you know.

scripts.cta: Let the raindrops sing you a lullaby to dreamland.

scripts.title: Soft Wind Lullaby
scripts.hook: Feel the soft wind blowing, it's time to close your eyes and dream
scripts.lyrics: The soft wind whispers secrets, don't you hear? It carries dreams to those who sleep. Close your eyes, snuggle in tight.

scenes.text: The soft wind whispers secrets, don't you hear?
It carries dreams to those who sleep.
scenes.visual: Dream clouds or fluffy sheep animation

scenes.text: Close your eyes, snuggle in tight.
scenes.visual: Baby hugging self or stuffed animal animation

scripts.cta: Let the soft wind guide you to a peaceful sleep.

scripts.title: Nighttime Nature Sounds
scripts.hook: Listen to the forest as it sings you a lullaby
scripts.lyrics: The forest sings its song, so calm and deep. The stars shine bright, don't you sleep? Let the night sing you to dreamland.

scenes.text: The forest sings its song, so calm and deep.
The stars shine bright, don't you sleep?
Let the night sing you to dreamland.

scripts.cta: Drift off to sleep with the forest's gentle song.

scripts.title: Starry Night Lullaby
scripts.hook: Twinkle, twinkle, little star, guide you to your peaceful bed
scripts.lyrics: The stars shine bright and clear, so calm and near. It's time for sleep, don't you fear? Let the stars guide you to dreamland.

scenes.text: The stars shine bright and clear, so calm and near.
It's time for sleep, don't you fear?
Let the stars guide you to dreamland.

scripts.cta: Sleep tight, little one, under the starry night.
